'''mashaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachhorse|coachhorse]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachhorse|coachhorse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mashaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæshæhæth|mæshæhæth]] || [[word:mæshæhæj|mæshæhæj]] || [[word:mæshæhæsh|mæshæhæsh]] || [[word:mæshæhæ|mæshæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashashahath|mashashahath]] || [[word:mashashahaj|mashashahaj]] || [[word:mashashahash|mashashahash]] || [[word:mashashaha|mashashaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashahath|mashahath]] || [[word:mashahaj|mashahaj]] || [[word:mashahash|mashahash]] || [[word:mashaha|mashaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashafhath|mashafhath]] || [[word:mashafhaj|mashafhaj]] || [[word:mashafhash|mashafhash]] || [[word:mashafhaf|mashafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mashahatha|mashahatha]] || [[word:mashahaja|mashahaja]] || [[word:mashahasha|mashahasha]] || [[word:mashahaka|mashahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mashahath|mashahath]] || [[word:mashahaj|mashahaj]] || [[word:mashahash|mashahash]] || [[word:mashaha|mashaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mashahathal|mashahathal]] || [[word:mashahajal|mashahajal]] || [[word:mashahashal|mashahashal]] || [[word:mashahakal|mashahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mashahathatha|mashahathatha]] || [[word:mashahajaja|mashahajaja]] || [[word:mashahashasha|mashahashasha]] || [[word:mashahaka|mashahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mashahathan|mashahathan]] || [[word:mashahajan|mashahajan]] || [[word:mashahashan|mashahashan]] || [[word:mashahakan|mashahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mashahathaoro|mashahathaoro]] || [[word:mashahajaoro|mashahajaoro]] || [[word:mashahashaoro|mashahashaoro]] || [[word:mashahakaoro|mashahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
